steps.title: Read the intersection point from the graph
steps.content: Locate where the two lines cross. The crossing occurs at x = 3 and y = 4, so the solution is $$(3,4)$$ . That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Eliminate the remaining choices
steps.content: Check the other answer choices: A) (2,3), C) (4,5), D) (5,6). None of these points lie on both lines in the graph, so only choice B works.
